center.name: 特鲁斯马迪山
center.summary: 特鲁斯马迪山是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括黑胁啄花鸟，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The black-sided flowerpecker is endemic to the montane forests of Borneo. It is typically seen above and as high as in some locations, though it also descends as low as on two of the island's bigger mountains (Kinabalu and Mount Trus Madi). There are far more records from Malaysia's states of Sabah and Sarawak than from Indonesia's Kalimantan provinces. It is found in primary and secondary forest, kerangas forest (heathland), scrub, and gardens
